outcome: Implement the Notion → Notes migration backlog (visual + functional parity) from docs/superpowers/specs/2026-06-18-notion-migration-spec.md, in phases. Databases are DEFERRED (separate later project). Accent stays brand CLAY (adopt Notion's STRUCTURE — monochrome sidebar greys, selection overlay, callout tint palette derived from our tokens — not Notion blue). Each shipped feature keeps the app green; work is branch-only until the user approves a deploy.
constraints: pnpm lint (0 errors), pnpm test, and pnpm build pass at the end of every iteration — never leave the app red.

Do NOT regress shipped Notes features (nestable pages, autosave, slash menu incl. callout/divider/columns/toc/bookmark/equation, sub-pages, @mentions, favorites, quick switcher, cover/emoji, full-width toggle, code highlight+lang-detect, rich templates, page ··· menu).
Branch-only (feat/notes-notion-impl). No merge to main / no production deploy without explicit user approval.
Keep BlockNote as the foundation — theme/extend via config, CSS, custom blocks, slash items; do not replace it.
Keep the brand clay accent; databases remain OUT until separately greenlit.
Only touch the Notes surface + its nav/layout touchpoints; don't disturb other app sections.
boundaries: src/components/notes/**, src/app/(app)/notes/**, src/app/api/notes/**, src/lib/notes/**, src/lib/models/notes-page.ts, notes-related validations, notes nav/layout touchpoints in src/components/layout/** + content-shell, and src/app/globals.css for scoped Notes CSS.
May add npm deps (pnpm) when justified (e.g. next/font Inter).
Follow the phased backlog (Phase 0 → 6) in the migration spec.
iteration_policy: Work the backlog in order, smallest-risk-highest-impact first. Phase 0 (Inter font on Notes surface; monochrome sidebar hover/active; heading scale 40/30/24/20 + widen comfortable column ~900px). Then Phase 1 (callout borderless tinted fill + 9-color tint palette; quote 3px left border; side-menu theme + placeholder). Phase 2 (page header: icon overlaps cover, title 40/700, hover add-cover/icon, reposition). Phase 3 (sidebar per-row ⊕/⋯). Phase 4 (slim top bar + richer ··· + slash icons). Phase 5 (Cmd-K content search; empty-state copy). Phase 6 (expose/verify BlockNote built-ins: formatting toolbar/turn-into/color; app shortcuts; copy-link; page duplicate/move/Trash/export; paste-smart). TDD pure logic; verify build/lint/test each round; commit; one-line log. Pause for the user to visually review before any deploy.
blocked_condition: Report/pause if a change needs infra/secrets, an irreversible/outward action (deploy), or a product decision (e.g. reviving databases, switching accent). Note exactly what's needed.
log: Phase 0 DONE: Inter font scoped to Notes (next/font --font-notes); Notion heading scale in-editor via [data-content-type=heading][data-level] (30/24/20, 600); page title → 40px; comfortable column 768→900px; sidebar rows accent→monochrome grey hover/active (active text darker+semibold). App green (0 lint errors, 320 tests, build ok). Next: Phase 1 — callout borderless tinted fill + 9-color tint palette, quote 3px left border, theme BlockNote side menu + placeholder. Branch-only; recommend a visual review before any deploy.
Phase 1 (part) DONE: callout borderless tinted fill; quote 3px left border; Notion placeholder copy.
Phase 1 DONE: 9-color callout tint palette (color prop + swatch picker, [data-callout-color] CSS light+dark, helper TDD'd, 323 tests).

Phase 2 (part) DONE: page header — 64px icon overlapping the cover bottom when set; Add-cover affordance reveals on header hover when none; title 40px. App green (0 errors, 323 tests, build ok). Still TODO in Phase 2: cover REPOSITION (needs a `coverPosition` model field + drag focal point). Next: cover reposition, then Phase 3 (sidebar per-row ⊕ add-subpage + ⋯ menu).

Phase 3 DONE: sidebar TreeRow now has hover ⊕ add-subpage (POST /api/notes parentId → expand + navigate) and a ⋯ menu (inline Rename via input, Add sub-page, Delete) folding the old 🗑; ⭐ favorite kept; monochrome theming, clay accent. App green (0 errors, 323 tests, build ok). Next: Phase 4 — slim Notes top bar + richer ··· menu + slash-item icons + popover transitions.
